## Meeting Purpose

[Review Atlas workflow and pipeline for new CM Saskia, addressing challenges with output quality and efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas workflow requires strategic input at each stage (assignment, brief, outline) to control output quality and length](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Writing guidelines should focus on high-level structural guidance, with specific edits done later](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Custom pipelines can be created for different content types (e.g. technical vs. top-funnel)](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Importance of establishing GrowthX as content strategy experts with clients, balancing their requests with best practices](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Workflow Overview

  - [Assignment directions: Key for influencing initial output; use detailed prompts, not just keywords](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Brief: Opportunity to remove unnecessary sections and control article length](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Outline: Critical stage for structural edits before full draft](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Writing guidelines: Focus on high-level instructions (tone, structure) rather than specific formatting](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [New feature coming: LLM-powered editor for targeted revisions and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Challenge: Clients often request highly technical content that's difficult to verify](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Solution: Propose a funnel approach, starting with broader topics to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Tactic: Create separate pipelines for technical vs. general content](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [For technical content: Limit sources to client's official documentation/repos](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)

### Improving Output Quality

  - [Experiment with assignment directions to guide initial output](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Utilize personas strategically (e.g., create a pipeline targeting specific audience)](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Understand inputs for each stage to effectively influence results](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Use LLMs externally to brainstorm article ideas from keywords](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=2306.0)

### Client Management

  - [Establish GrowthX as content strategy experts early in relationship](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Balance client requests with best practices for SEO and audience growth](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Propose broader topics for "easy wins" to build trust before tackling highly technical content](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to experiment with Atlas, focusing on strategic inputs at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meetings to discuss findings and refine approach](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Explore creation of custom pipelines for Prophecy's technical content needs](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Await rollout of new LLM-powered editor feature for more efficient revisions](https://fathom.video/share/QFarjGtvuBtd3-GZ5xhab2W6p3_nZnMU?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
